raw.subject: Your Kenosha page caught my eye, B&G TowingLLC
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the map of service areas you post on your Facebook page, including Oshkosh, WI, Milwaukee, WI, and Kenosha County, WI. It gives a great sense of your local reach.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers on the phone, looking for emergency towing services in Kenosha.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/b-g-towingllc-kenosha

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts, with an emergency call CTA, a list of services, a service area map, and a sticky phone bar for easy contact. It's just a starting point, but I think it could help you showcase your trusted Kenosha service to a wider audience.

Would you like to discuss building it out with a flat fee for local businesses? Reply or give me a quick call to get started.
